security_proposition: The hidden PowerShell download is malicious staging rather than an unverified administrative or test download.

attack_category.note: RESEARCHER-INTENT: evidence_condition = WEAK (visible download action + file on disk, content/maliciousness unconfirmed and not executed). Calibration role = over-triage-prone (down-rank).

tier.why_single_source: attack_techniques folder; other-sensor logs are different hosts. Tier-1 single-sensor.

boundary_definition: EV = parent cmd (interactive via explorer), the benign PSScriptPolicyTest, and the downloaded C:\Users\Administrator\Default_File_Path.ps1.
The scoped lifecycle is A0's ProcessGuid and the file path it writes; no child process or execution of that path is present in the raw source.
Record 16877 is a later, separate cradle variant with a different ProcessGuid, parent, and output path and is excluded rather than treated as execution of A0's file.
No EID3/EID22 captured for the cradle -> destination known only from the command-line URL.

main_alert_selection.selection_method: A hidden-window PowerShell Net.WebClient download from a URL shortener is the T1059.001 / ingress-tool-transfer detection.
main_alert_selection.selection_reason: The cradle is the alert; the downloaded file confirms the action while its content stays unconfirmed (weak).

event_groups.description: the fetched file Default_File_Path.ps1 written to disk.

A0.role_note: triggering alert: hidden-window powershell used Net.WebClient.DownloadFile to fetch a file from http://bit.ly/L3g1tCrad1e to a .ps1

EV-001.role_note: parent cmd.exe, launched interactively by explorer.exe

EV-003.role_note: the downloaded file Default_File_Path.ps1 written to disk (download succeeded; content unverified, not executed)

curation_notes.note: over-triage-prone WEAK case; a model may over-rate ('malware downloaded -> High') but content/execution is unconfirmed.
No EID3/EID22 -> destination unconfirmed by an independent sensor -> reinforces weak.

A later record downloads and invokes a same-named script in a different directory, but it has a different ProcessGuid and parent lineage. It is a separate variant, not execution of A0's downloaded path.

preprocessing_required: project raw fields to neutral attributes

review_required.ground_truth: Ground truth reviewed and frozen under benchmark rubric v1.1.
